description_long: This is a long, rectangular wooden storage cabinet with a light oak finish, featuring a combination of drawers and open shelving. The front face displays four wide drawers and two open shelves on the left side, providing both concealed and accessible storage options. The back view reveals the internal structure, showing compartments and drawer runners, with a white interior contrasting the wood exterior. The sides are plain, emphasizing the clean, modern lines of the design. The top surface is flat and expansive, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. This cabinet is designed for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or residential living rooms, offering both functionality and aesthetic appeal.
description: A modern, light oak-finished cabinet with four drawers and two open shelves, featuring a flat top and a white interior structure. It combines concealed and open storage in a sleek, rectangular form.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying four wide drawers and two open shelves on the left, with a clean, modern design.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, similar to the left, with a plain wooden panel and no visible openings.
description_view_3: The back view, revealing the white internal structure, drawer runners, and compartment divisions.
